utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully detailed: the property has address, type, details, and price; financing includes lender, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, and fees; legal_services includes provider, list of services, detailed costs, and total; moving_services lists provider, inclusions, cost, and storage; setup_services lists all utilities with setup fees and total cost; total_budget provides breakdown of all costs with grand total. Therefore, all 6 items are included and fully specified.
